user.title: Select 8 languages to learn
user.description: Choose exactly {count} languages from the {total} available. The right column will show translations in your Home Assistant UI language.

level.title: Level for {language} ({code})
level.description:
Select your CEFR level for {language}. Language {index} of {total}.

Recommended starting level: **{recommended}**

error.vocab_not_found: Vocabulary file not found for this language/level combination.

init.title: Reconfigure languages
init.description: Choose exactly {count} languages. Your progress will be preserved.

level.title: Level for {language} ({code})
level.description:
Select your CEFR level for {language}. Language {index} of {total}.

Recommended starting level: **{recommended}**

register_answer.name: Register Answer
register_answer.description: Register a correct or incorrect answer for a word.

word_id.name: Word ID
word_id.description: The word ID from the vocabulary (e.g. 'de_A1_001')

complete_round.name: Complete Round
complete_round.description: Mark the current 5-word round as complete and advance to the next.

set_active_language.name: Set Active Language
set_active_language.description: Switch the active language being practiced.

mark_day_played.name: Mark Day Played
mark_day_played.description: Mark today as a played day to maintain the daily streak.

get_current_round.name: Get Current Round
get_current_round.description: Fires a quiz8_languages_round_data event with the current round's word pairs.
